componentDescription: A component for selecting emojis from a categorized list, including search and recent options.

id.description: Optional unique identifier for the component.

name.description: Optional name attribute for form compatibility.

label.description: Optional text label displayed with the picker.

placeholder.description: Optional placeholder text for the search input field.

helperText.description: Optional helper text displayed below the picker for guidance.

value.description: The current selected emoji as a string.

defaultValue.description: The initial selected emoji when the component mounts.

onChange.description: Callback function triggered when an emoji is selected, returning the emoji as a string.

onEmojiSelect.description: Callback function triggered when an emoji is selected, providing the full Emoji object.

views.description: Custom styles to be applied to various parts of the EmojiPicker.

size.description: Defines the size of the EmojiPicker component.

shape.description: Defines the shape variant of the EmojiPicker component.

variant.description: Defines the visual variant of the EmojiPicker component.

error.description: Indicates if the component is in an error state, typically for validation feedback.

isDisabled.description: If true, the EmojiPicker will be disabled and non-interactive.

isReadOnly.description: If true, the EmojiPicker will be read-only, preventing user input but remaining interactable for display.

showSearch.description: Determines whether the emoji search input field should be displayed.

showCategories.description: Determines whether emoji categories should be displayed for navigation.

showRecentEmojis.description: Determines whether the section for recently used emojis should be displayed.

maxRecentEmojis.description: Sets the maximum number of recent emojis to display.

enabledCategories.description: An array of EmojiCategory values to specify which categories are enabled and visible.

customEmojis.description: An array of custom Emoji objects to be included in the picker.

isOpen.description: Controls the open/closed state of the emoji picker dropdown.

onOpen.description: Callback function triggered when the emoji picker dropdown opens.

onClose.description: Callback function triggered when the emoji picker dropdown closes.

closeOnSelect.description: If true, the picker will automatically close after an emoji is selected.

aria-label.description: ARIA attribute for accessibility, providing a descriptive label for the component.

aria-describedby.description: ARIA attribute for accessibility, linking the component to an element that describes it.
